audit_items.proof_trace: cache_fail_constructor contains zero allocations — its entire body is `return 1;`. The universally quantified property holds vacuously because the set { alloc(p) in cache_fail_constructor } is empty. The buffer passed to the constructor is allocated by cache_alloc (cache.c:79) and properly freed by cache_alloc (cache.c:85) when the constructor returns non-zero.
